title: Feature request: in-app ability to hibernate companion nodes

messages.author: SomePotato (Factory System)
messages.text: For users who have companion nodes without a screen, it would be useful to have an ability to hibernate/sleep mode/turn off the companion nodes as needed. Should not apply for repeaters since they are expected to be on 24/7
messages.content_html: For users who have companion nodes without a screen, it would be useful to have an ability to hibernate/sleep mode/turn off the companion nodes as needed. Should not apply for repeaters since they are expected to be on 24/7
